channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: I Asked ChatGPT What WIRED’s Reviewers Recommend—Its Answers Were All Wrong
item.description: Want to know what our reviewers have actually tested and picked as the best TVs, headphones, and laptops? Ask ChatGPT, and it'll give you the wrong answers.

item.title: Beyond CRUD: A Practical Guide to Modeling Business Processes in REST APIs
item.description: Most developers agree that naming things is one of the hardest parts of our job. Designing a clear, effective RESTful API comes in as a close runner-up. On the surface, REST makes a lot of sense....

item.title: What Is Persistent Memory in AI? How It Works & Why It Matters
item.description: Introduction What is persistent memory in AI? Persistent memory in AI is a dedicated infrastructure layer that enables artificial intelligence systems to retain, update, and recall user facts,...

item.title: Why Orange Cats Share One Braincell
item.description: Why Orange Cats Share One Braincell Posted April 1, 2026 — and no, this is not an April Fool's joke. The cats are really like this. If you have ever watched an orange cat confidently stride off a...

item.title: Key Apache IoTDB Distributed Tuning Details You Must Understand
item.description: How many databases should you create? How should you model your data to fully utilize hardware resources? When deploying Apache IoTDB in distributed mode, teams often face the same challenge: how...

item.title: 🚀 Frontend Form Validation Made Simple (React Hook Form + Zod)
item.description: Form validation is something every frontend developer deals with. But the way we implement it makes a big difference. In many projects, validation starts simple… and slowly becomes messy: Too many...

item.title: I Built an AI Tool That Detects AND Humanizes AI Text (Here’s Why)

item.title: Step‑by‑Step Guide: Create an Autonomous Agent in Copilot Studio
item.description: Introduction Autonomous agents in Microsoft Copilot Studio can independently perform tasks, make decisions, call workflows, and generate outputs without continuous user interaction. This guide...

item.title: I Built a Free Browser-Based Digital Logic Simulator for Learning Boolean Algebra
item.description: Boolean algebra and digital logic are much easier to understand when you can build and test circuits visually. That idea is exactly why I created Boolflow — a free browser-based digital logic...

item.title: Why Speech Recognition API Requires a Different Architecture
item.description: Speech Recognition API: Streaming, WebSockets and Latency A speech recognition API that accepts a file and returns a transcript is a solved problem.The architecture is simple because the...

item.title: Why fetch() Can Be Safer Than Axios After the 2026 Axios Hack
item.description: The question isn’t whether Axios is a “bad” library; it’s about risk surface. The Axios NPM compromise in March 2026 exposed a structural weakness in depending on third‑party libraries for...

item.title: Google Attributes Axios npm Supply Chain Attack to North Korean Group UNC1069
item.description: Google has formally attributed the supply chain compromise of the popular Axios npm package to a financially motivated North Korean threat activity cluster tracked as UNC1069. "We have attributed...

item.title: Falcon Perception
Claude Code Source Leaked via npm Packaging Error, Anthropic Confirms
item.description: Anthropic on Tuesday confirmed that internal code for its popular artificial intelligence (AI) coding assistant, Claude Code, had been inadvertently released due to a human error. "No sensitive...

item.title: Gradient Labs gives every bank customer an AI account manager
item.description: Gradient Labs uses GPT-4.1 and GPT-5.4 mini and nano to power AI agents that automate banking support workflows with low latency and high reliability.

item.title: Mercor says it was hit by cyberattack tied to compromise of open-source LiteLLM project
item.description: The AI recruiting startup confirmed a security incident after an extortion hacking crew took credit for stealing data from the company's systems.

item.title: The best deals to shop during the last few hours of Amazon’s Big Spring Sale
item.description: Amazon loves to manufacture an event. March is historically a dry spell for deals; however, with Amazon’s third annual Big Spring Sale, which runs through 11:59PM PT tonight, the retail behemoth...

item.title: Amazon’s Big Spring Sale 2026: all of the latest deals
item.description: If you’re looking for the best time to get a deal this spring, it might very well be during Amazon’s Big Spring Sale, which runs through 11:59PM PT tonight. We’re still highlighting the best that...

item.title: Anthropic is having a month
item.description: A human really borks things at Anthropic for the second time this week.

item.title: The AirPods Pro 3 are nearly matching their best-ever price for Amazon’s Big Spring Sale
item.description: Earlier this month, Apple announced the AirPods Max 2, a pair of over-ear headphones that leverage the company’s H2 chip for AI-powered live translation, conversation awareness, and a host of...

item.title: Amazon is offering up to 50 percent off chargers from Anker and others for its Big Spring Sale
item.description: Amazon’s Big Spring Sale may not have been as “big” as Black Friday or even Prime Day, but depending on what you’re after, the discounts are more appealing than you might think. Take charging...

item.title: Salesforce announces an AI-heavy makeover for Slack, with 30 new features
item.description: Slack just got a whole lot more useful.

item.title: Claude Code leak exposes a Tamagotchi-style ‘pet’ and an always-on agent
item.description: After Anthropic released Claude Code's 2.1.88 update, users quickly discovered that it contained a package with a source map file containing its TypeScript codebase, with one person on X calling...

item.title: You can grab a four-pack of Govee’s color-changing smart bulbs for just $27
item.description: Spring cleaning isn’t just about clearing things out. It’s also a chance to refresh your living space, and a simple place to start is smart lighting — specifically, Govee’s Smart A19 LED Light...

item.title: OpenAI, not yet public, raises $3B from retail investors in monster $122B fund raise
item.description: OpenAI's latest funding round, led by Amazon, Nvidia, and SoftBank, values the AI lab at $852 billion as it nears an IPO.

item.title: You can now use ChatGPT with Apple’s CarPlay
item.description: ChatGPT is now accessible from your CarPlay dashboard if you have iOS 26.4 or newer and the latest version of the ChatGPT app, 9to5Mac reports. Apple's recently launched iOS 26.4 update added...

item.title: Yupp shuts down after raising $33M from a16z crypto’s Chris Dixon
item.description: Less than a year after launching, with checks from some of the biggest names in Silicon Valley, crowdsourced AI model feedback startup Yupp is closing its business, the company said Tuesday.

item.title: Samsung’s new app claims to alleviate motion sickness using sound
item.description: Samsung released a new free app today called Hearapy, now available for Android devices through the Google Play store, that it claims can reduce the symptoms of motion sickness using just sound....

item.title: Anker’s power bank with built-in cables is one of my favorite gadgets, and it’s cheaper than usual
item.description: Anker’s Laptop Power Bank is one of the more useful gadgets I’ve bought in recent years. I know, it’s just a portable battery, but it’s packed with power and thoughtful features that are tough to...

item.title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is beautiful but a little too busy
item.description: With The Super Mario Bros. Movie, Nintendo entered the next phase of its plan to become a different kind of entertainment giant. Though it wasn't the company's first go at putting its iconic...
